title: Lemoned (Farmer's Delight)
description: This is small addon for Farmer's Delight, that adds lemons
body:
# Lemoned


Simple mod that adds lemons to minecraft, and is compatible with Farmer's Delight!

![Lemons!](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/8779a8863d579960715b282f8f4fb26cdaf4cc6e.png)

Find lemon farm or wandering trader, get lemon seeds, and harvest your lemons

Also adds lemon gun!




<details>
<summary>Spoiler</summary>

_(This is my first non MCreator mod, so it can have some small issues)_

</details>


[![Ko-fi](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/7687f60c02535d479dc55156b8de1a776f63ebbb.png)](https://ko-fi.com/tejty)
